contents:
[[example]]
name = "amdgpu_info"
required-features = [ "std",]

[[example]]
name = "vbios_dump"
required-features = [ "std",]

[[example]]
name = "vbios_parser"
required-features = [ "std",]

[[example]]
name = "gpu_metrics"
required-features = [ "std",]

[[example]]
name = "stable_pstate"
required-features = [ "std",]

[[example]]
name = "pp_table"
required-features = [ "std",]

[package]
name = "libdrm_amdgpu_sys"
version = "0.7.5"
edition = "2021"
build = "build.rs"
license = "MIT"
authors = [ "Umio Yasuno <coelacanth_dream@proton.me>",]
description = "libdrm_amdgpu bindings for Rust, and some methods ported from Mesa3D."
repository = "https://github.com/Umio-Yasuno/libdrm-amdgpu-sys-rs"
keywords = [ "amdgpu", "libdrm",]
links = "drm, drm_amdgpu"

[features]
default = [ "std", "link-drm",]
std = []
buildtime_bindgen = [ "bindgen", "pkg-config",]
link-drm = []

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[dependencies.libc]
version = "^0.2"
default-features = false

[build-dependencies.bindgen]
version = "^0.69"
optional = true

[build-dependencies.pkg-config]
version = "^0.3"
optional = true
